title: AgentEval Epic 2 static-inspection conformance fixture
description: Schema for Epic 2 Tier-1 keyword conformance fixtures (Story 2.4). SEPARATE from `fixture-schema.json` which is adapter-focused. Each fixture exercises ONE Tier-1 keyword against ONE input file + asserts either a happy-path result-shape OR an error-path error_code. Loaded + parametrized by `tests/conformance/test_ac_static_inspection_fixtures.py`.

fixture_id.description: Stable identifier (used in pytest parametrize id). Convention: <keyword-slug>-<happy|error>-<shortname>.

input_file_path.description: Path to the input file relative to the repo root. The keyword is invoked with this path as its primary argument.

kwargs.description: Optional additional kwargs passed to the keyword (e.g., `tool_name` + `server_name` for MCP.Get Tool Schema). Keys are kwarg names; values are JSON-serializable.

expected_result_shape.description: Happy-path only. Schema-like description of the returned value. Recognized keys: `type` (`dict`/`list`/`str`/`bool`/`int`/`float`/`none`), `contains_keys` (list of keys that must be present in the returned dict), `equals` (exact value match for scalars).

expected_field_name_substring.description: Error-path only. The raised error's `field_name` attribute must contain this substring (use for JSON Pointer assertions).

notes.description: Optional human-readable context for the fixture (e.g., 'reproduces issue #X').
